name: MSI PRO Z690-A WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.2 (PROZ690AWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO Z690-A WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support
description: MSI PRO Z690 ATX motherboard with DDR5 support, WiFi 6E, and PCIe 5.0 for high-performance builds.
